{{Quote|Let's not have any more 'victories' like this one, okay?|Maarek Stele's [[Imperial briefing officer|briefing officer]], at the end of the mission in which Kuuztin died|audio=KuuztinDebriefing-TF.flac|<ref name="TF" />}}
'''Kuuztin''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], Kuuztin was selected to join [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] task force during his campaign against the traitorous Grand Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. After leading a successful [[Attack on the Zaarin supply convoy|raid]] on a supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] bound for Zaarin's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], Kuuztin learned the location of one of Zaarin's [[Supply Base|supply depots]] and decided to [[Battle of Gwar|attack]] it without Thrawn's authorization. Kuuztin hoped the ambitious attack would lead to a promotion, but his overconfidence led him into an ambush, and he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Looks like Captain Kuuztin has taken us into an ambush!|Imperial officer|audio=KuuztinAmbush-TF.flac|<ref name="TF" />}}
[[File:ISDCourageous-TF.png|thumb|left|240px|Kuuztin commanded the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer ''Courageous''.]]
Kuuztin was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] who served as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and had a reputation for bravery.<ref name="TF" /> Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]],<ref name="DOD" /> [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] launched a [[Zaarin insurrection|coup]] against [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Zaarin's [[Battle of Imperial Center|initial attempt]] to abduct the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] failed, and Zaarin's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] was subsequently pushed back by loyal Imperial forces under the command of Grand Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. As Zaarin fled toward the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] to regroup for a new offensive, Kuuztin was one of the Imperial [[Officer/Legends|officers]] personally selected by Thrawn to quickly respond to any leads.<ref name="TF" />

When an Imperial probe detected a supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] led by the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Rahmat]]'' heading to the [[Semag system/Legends|Semag system]]<ref name="TF" /> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]],<ref name="TEA">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> where Zaarin was thought to be hiding, the ''Courageous'' was sent to [[Attack on the Zaarin supply convoy|capture]] any weapons or military supplies. Keeping the ''Courageous'' nearby to watch for Zaarin's forces, Kuuztin dispatched a [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] to engage the convoy's escorts while the [[Ace/Legends|ace]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] used the experimental [[Missile Boat]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] to destroy the ''Rahmat''.<ref name="TF" /> After the arrival of Zaarin's [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Strident]]'', Kuuztin entered the battle and launched the ''Courageous''{{'s}} [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] to assist Stele in destroying the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] while the Imperials captured the convoy [[Starship/Legends|ships]].<ref name="TF:OSG">''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>

Not only did the capture of the convoy deprive Zaarin of much-needed supplies, but interrogation of its crew revealed the location of a [[Supply Base|refitting base]] near [[Gwar]] that Zaarin was using as a marshaling area ahead of a planned ambush operation. Seeing the opportunity to catch Zaarin off-guard, Kuuztin decided to launch an immediate [[Battle of Gwar|preemptive strike]] on the facility without seeking authorization from Thrawn. After arriving in the [[Gwar system/Legends|system]], the ''Courageous'' and its starfighters set about destroying the base. However, with the arrival of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] [[Thunderer (Imperial-class)|''Thunderer'']] and [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']], and several flights of [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]], it became clear that Kuuztin had led his forces into a trap.<ref name="TF" /> Though Stele was able to escape to safety in his Missile Boat, Kuuztin and his crew remained trapped aboard the ''Courageous'', which was destroyed by a barrage of [[Proton bomb/Legends|proton bombs]].<ref name="TF:OSG" />

[[File:CourageousDestruction-TF.png|thumb|right|290px|The destruction of the ''Courageous'']]
Despite the loss of the ''Courageous'', Kuuztin's attack resulted in the destruction of Zaarin's [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Bomb (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Bomb'']] and the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]]s ''[[Kuma 1]]'', ''[[Kuma 2]]'', and ''[[Kuma 3]]'', leaving the losses roughly equal.<ref name="TF" /> Partly in retribution for the ''Courageous''{{'s}} destruction, Thrawn subsequently planned his own [[Battle of Serenity|trap]] for Zaarin, using a shipment of Missile Boats as bait to draw the renegade out.<ref name="TF:OSG" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|For this operation you will be under the command of Captain Kuuztin, another hand-picked officer known for his bravery.|Maarek Stele's briefing officer|audio=KuuztinBravery-TF.flac|<ref name="TF" />}}
Kuuztin was a skilled commander whose reputation for bravery led to him being handpicked by Grand Admiral Thrawn to take part in the toughest operations of the Zaarin campaign. He was also ambitious and overconfident—qualities that proved to be his undoing. Upon learning that Zaarin was marshaling his forces for an attack, Kuuztin decided not to alert Thrawn and to instead risk an immediate attack. The captain believed that a swift victory over Zaarin would lead to a promotion and the chance to replace Thrawn as leader of the task force. However, the ill-planned attack instead led to the destruction of the ''Courageous'' and Kuuztin's [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="TF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kuuztin was created for the [[1995]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Collector's CD-ROM'']] and is mentioned in mission briefings for the first three missions of the previously unreleased "Enemies of the Empire" campaign and in in-mission communications during the second mission, in which the character is killed when the ''Courageous'' is destroyed.<ref name="TF" />
